---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a problem in the protocol spec, schemas, fixtures, or examples
title: ""
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the problem.

## Affected Artifact

- [ ] `SPEC.md`
- [ ] `schemas/`
- [ ] `tests/fixtures/`
- [ ] `examples/`
- [ ] README or contributor docs

## Expected Behavior

What should the protocol or validation do?

## Actual Behavior

What happens instead?

## Reproduction

Include the smallest event, HTTP body, schema, or documentation reference that
shows the issue.

## Validation

Paste relevant `make test` output or explain why validation was not run.

## Security

Do not include secrets, private keys, Session IDs, Pairing material, signatures,
nonces, or transfer URLs. If this is a security vulnerability, do not submit this
issue; follow `SECURITY.md`.
